  1. Home

Flexible planning

Organise senior care supplies month by month

Estimate quantities, group complementary supplies and prepare the next order without committing to an automatic subscription.

Organise my monthly purchaseCalculate usage
  • Personal guidance
  • Confirmed quotation
  • Support in Panama

How planning works

A purchase routine you can adjust

  1. 1

    Estimate usage

    Start with average units per day and the number of days to cover.

  2. 2

    Group complementary supplies

    Include underpads, gloves, wipes or other needed items.

  3. 3

    Review before the next order

    Confirm changes in size, quantity, frequency or delivery area.

  4. 4

    Decide each time

    Modify, postpone or cancel the next order before it is confirmed.

More control

What you can organise

01

Reminders

Coordinate when to review remaining stock and prepare the next order.

02

Quantities

Adjust when actual usage is higher or lower than the estimate.

03

Size changes

Review measurements and format before repeating the purchase.

04

Multiple products

Consolidate diapers, underpads, gloves and other supplies.

05

Flexible orders

Frequency is a planning reference, not an automatic charge.

06

Care facilities

Planning may include several sizes and patients.

Create a first estimate

Monthly usage calculator

Use the current daily average. You can then send the result through WhatsApp to confirm quantities and presentations.

Weekly usage28
Fortnightly usage60
30-day usage120
Selected period usage120

Informational estimate. Actual usage may vary.

Request a quote with this estimate

Not an automatic subscription

Mimo Senior does not confirm, charge or dispatch a new order without coordination. Monthly planning helps anticipate needs, but every order is reviewed.

Step-by-step form

Prepare your quotation request

Step 1 of 3

  1. Basic details
  2. Need
  3. Frequency and summary
Basic details

Facility details

Need

Measure waist and hips in centimetres and keep both values. The exact chart will be checked against the available product.
Additional products
Frequency and summary

Review your summary

You can go back and edit any answer before opening WhatsApp.


    

  

    

  
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
Can I change the next order quantity?
Yes. The estimate should adapt to actual usage and any change in size or routine.
Can I cancel or postpone it?
Yes. As long as the next order has not been confirmed, you can change the date or decide not to place it.
Tell us what you need
We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
Talk on WhatsApp

Guidance and quotations for everyday senior care supplies in Panama.
